7 Days to Die.SourceNotes: Community list from 7daystodie.fandom.com command console page.

Commands.Label: help
Commands.Description: Show what a command does and how to use it.

Commands.Label: admin add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the admin list and give them a permission level.

Commands.Label: admin remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the admin list.

Commands.Label: ai pathgrid
Commands.Description: Turn the AI path grid debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: ai pathlines
Commands.Description: Turn AI path line debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: aiddebug
Commands.Description: Turn AI director debug output on or off.

Commands.Label: ban add
Commands.Description: Ban a player for a set time, with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: ban list
Commands.Description: Show the current ban list.

Commands.Label: ban remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the ban list.

Commands.Label: buff
Commands.Description: Apply a buff to yourself.

Commands.Label: buffplayer
Commands.Description: Apply a buff to a player.

Commands.Label: chunkcache
Commands.Description: Show chunk cache information.

Commands.Label: clear
Commands.Description: Clear the console output.

Commands.Label: cp add
Commands.Description: Set the required permission level for a command.

Commands.Label: cp remove
Commands.Description: Remove a custom permission rule from a command.

Commands.Label: cp list
Commands.Description: Show the current command permission rules.

Commands.Label: creativemenu
Commands.Description: Turn the creative menu on or off.

Commands.Label: deathscreen
Commands.Description: Turn the death screen on or off.

Commands.Label: debuff
Commands.Description: Remove a buff from yourself.

Commands.Label: debuffplayer
Commands.Description: Remove a buff from a player.

Commands.Label: debugmenu
Commands.Description: Turn the debug menu on or off.

Commands.Label: enablescope
Commands.Description: Turn scoped view on or off.

Commands.Label: exhausted
Commands.Description: Make the player exhausted.

Commands.Label: exportcurrentconfigs
Commands.Description: Export the current game config files.

Commands.Label: exportitemicons
Commands.Description: Export the game item icons.

Commands.Label: getgamepref
Commands.Description: Show the current value of a game preference.

Commands.Label: getgamestat
Commands.Description: Show the current value of a game stat.

Commands.Label: gettime
Commands.Description: Show the current in-game time.

Commands.Label: gfx af
Commands.Description: Set anisotropic filtering to 0 or 1.

Commands.Label: gfx dti
Commands.Description: Turn texture info debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: gfx dtpix
Commands.Description: Turn texture pixel debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: givequest
Commands.Description: Give a quest to the player.

Commands.Label: giveself
Commands.Description: Give an item to yourself.

Commands.Label: giveselfskillxp
Commands.Description: Give skill XP to yourself (legacy).

Commands.Label: giveselfxp
Commands.Description: Give XP to yourself.

Commands.Label: kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player from the server, with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: kickall
Commands.Description: Kick all players with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: killall
Commands.Description: Kill all entities.

Commands.Label: lights
Commands.Description: Turn light debug output on or off.

Commands.Label: listents
Commands.Description: Show the active entities.

Commands.Label: listlandclaim
Commands.Description: Show the land claim blocks.

Commands.Label: listplayerids
Commands.Description: Show the player IDs.

Commands.Label: listplayers
Commands.Description: Show the players who are connected right now.

Commands.Label: listthreads
Commands.Description: Show the running threads.

Commands.Label: loggamestate
Commands.Description: Write the current game state to the log, with an optional message.

Commands.Label: loglevel
Commands.Description: Turn one log level on or off.

Commands.Label: mem
Commands.Description: Show memory information.

Commands.Label: memcl
Commands.Description: Show memory information and run garbage collection.

Commands.Label: pplist
Commands.Description: List persistent player data.

Commands.Label: removequest
Commands.Description: Remove a quest.

Commands.Label: repairchunkdensity
Commands.Description: Check chunk density at the given coordinates, and optionally fix it.

Commands.Label: saveworld
Commands.Description: Save the world right now.

Commands.Label: say
Commands.Description: Send a chat message to everyone on the server.

Commands.Label: setgamepref
Commands.Description: Set a game preference to a new value.

Commands.Label: setgamestat
Commands.Description: Set a game stat to a new value.

Commands.Label: settempunit
Commands.Description: Set the temperature unit to C or F.

Commands.Label: settime
Commands.Description: Set the in-game day, hour, and minute.

Commands.Label: showalbedo
Commands.Description: Turn albedo render debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: showchunkdata
Commands.Description: Show chunk data debug information.

Commands.Label: showclouds
Commands.Description: Turn cloud debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: shownexthordetime
Commands.Description: Show how long until the next horde.

Commands.Label: shownormals
Commands.Description: Turn normals render debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: showspecular
Commands.Description: Turn specular render debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: shutdown
Commands.Description: Shut down the server.

Commands.Label: sounddebug
Commands.Description: Turn sound debug output on or off.

Commands.Label: spawnairdrop
Commands.Description: Spawn an airdrop.

Commands.Label: spawnentity
Commands.Description: Spawn an entity by ID at a player.

Commands.Label: spawnscouts
Commands.Description: Spawn scout zombies.

Commands.Label: spawnscreen
Commands.Description: Open the spawn screen.

Commands.Label: spawnsupplycrate
Commands.Description: Spawn a supply crate.

Commands.Label: spawnwh
Commands.Description: Spawn a wandering horde.

Commands.Label: spectrum
Commands.Description: Set or switch the lighting spectrum.

Commands.Label: starve
Commands.Description: Make the player starve.

Commands.Label: staticmap
Commands.Description: Generate a static map image.

Commands.Label: switchview
Commands.Description: Switch between first-person and third-person view.

Commands.Label: systeminfo
Commands.Description: Show system information.

Commands.Label: teleport
Commands.Description: Teleport to a player or target location.

Commands.Label: thirsty
Commands.Description: Make the player thirsty.

Commands.Label: traderarea
Commands.Description: Turn trader area debug or visibility on or off.

Commands.Label: updatelighton
Commands.Description: Force the lights to update for a player.

Commands.Label: version
Commands.Description: Show the current server or game version.

Commands.Label: water
Commands.Description: Turn water debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: weather
Commands.Description: Turn weather debug view on or off.

Commands.Label: weathersurvival
Commands.Description: Turn weather survival effects on or off.

Commands.Label: whitelist add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the whitelist so they are allowed to join.

Commands.Label: whitelist remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the whitelist.

Commands.Label: whitelist list
Commands.Description: Show the players on the whitelist.

Hytale.SourceNotes: Community lists from HypeServ, HytaleCommands, and PC Gamer; official developer command list not published.

Commands.Label: /help
Commands.Description: Show the available commands.

Commands.Label: /heal
Commands.Description: Restore full health and stamina.

Commands.Label: /fillsignature
Commands.Description: Fill the signature meter.

Commands.Label: /leave
Commands.Description: Leave the current world or server.

Commands.Label: /unstuck
Commands.Description: Teleport to a safe spot if you are stuck.

Commands.Label: /inventory backpack
Commands.Description: Show or resize your backpack inventory.

Commands.Label: /inventory clear
Commands.Description: Clear your inventory.

Commands.Label: /inventory see
Commands.Description: Show another player's inventory.

Commands.Label: /memories unlockall
Commands.Description: Unlock all memories.

Commands.Label: /memories clear
Commands.Description: Clear the unlocked memories.

Commands.Label: /kill
Commands.Description: Kill yourself, or the specified player.

Commands.Label: /neardeath
Commands.Description: Drop health to a near-death level.

Commands.Label: /damage
Commands.Description: Deal a set amount of damage to a player.

Commands.Label: /emote
Commands.Description: Play an emote.

Commands.Label: /mount
Commands.Description: Spawn a mount, or mount one.

Commands.Label: /ping
Commands.Description: Show ping or latency.

Commands.Label: /spawn
Commands.Description: Teleport to spawn.

Commands.Label: /warp set
Commands.Description: Create a named warp point.

Commands.Label: /warp go
Commands.Description: Teleport to a named warp point.

Commands.Label: /warp remove
Commands.Description: Remove a named warp point.

Commands.Label: /warp list
Commands.Description: Show the available warp points.

Commands.Label: /warp reload
Commands.Description: Reload the saved warp data.

Commands.Label: /tp home
Commands.Description: Teleport to your home location.

Commands.Label: /tp top
Commands.Description: Teleport to the top of the world/structure.

Commands.Label: /tp
Commands.Description: Teleport to a player.

Commands.Label: /gamemode creative
Commands.Description: Switch to creative mode.

Commands.Label: /gamemode exploration
Commands.Description: Switch to exploration mode.

Commands.Label: /worldmap reload
Commands.Description: Reload the world map.

Commands.Label: /worldmap discover
Commands.Description: Reveal the world map.

Commands.Label: /worldmap undiscover
Commands.Description: Hide the revealed world map again.

Commands.Label: /worldmap clearmarkers
Commands.Description: Clear the world map markers.

Commands.Label: /time dawn
Commands.Description: Set the time to dawn.

Commands.Label: /time midday
Commands.Description: Set the time to midday.

Commands.Label: /time dusk
Commands.Description: Set the time to dusk.

Commands.Label: /time midnight
Commands.Description: Set the time to midnight.

Commands.Label: /noon
Commands.Description: Set the time to noon and pause time.

Commands.Label: /weather reset
Commands.Description: Reset the weather back to its normal state.

Commands.Label: /give
Commands.Description: Give yourself an item.

Commands.Label: /give player
Commands.Description: Give another player an item.

Commands.Label: /op self
Commands.Description: Grant yourself operator permissions.

Commands.Label: /op add
Commands.Description: Grant operator permissions to a player.

Commands.Label: /op remove
Commands.Description: Remove operator permissions from a player.

Commands.Label: /who
Commands.Description: Show the players who are connected right now.

Commands.Label: /whoami
Commands.Description: Show player details for yourself, or for another player if you name them.

Commands.Label: /whereami
Commands.Description: Show your location, or another player's location if you name them.

Commands.Label: /kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player from the server.

Commands.Label: /ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player, with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: /unban
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the ban list.

Commands.Label: /whitelist list
Commands.Description: Show the players on the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /whitelist enable
Commands.Description: Turn on the whitelist so only approved players can join.

Commands.Label: /whitelist disable
Commands.Description: Turn off the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /whitelist add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the whitelist so they are allowed to join.

Commands.Label: /whitelist remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /backup
Commands.Description: Create a backup of the server data.

Commands.Label: /stop
Commands.Description: Stop the server.

Commands.Label: /server dump
Commands.Description: Show a detailed server information dump.

Commands.Label: /server gc
Commands.Description: Run server garbage collection to clean up memory.

Commands.Label: /server stats
Commands.Description: Show server stats, or one specific stat if you include a value.

Commands.Label: /spawning
Commands.Description: Turn spawning on or off, or change how it behaves.

Commands.Label: /perm
Commands.Description: Manage permissions.

Commands.Label: /plugin
Commands.Description: Manage plugins.

Commands.Label: /sudo
Commands.Description: Run a command as another player.

Commands.Label: /block
Commands.Description: Run block debug or management commands.

Commands.Label: /chunk
Commands.Description: Run chunk debug or management commands.

Commands.Label: /fluid
Commands.Description: Run fluid debug or management commands.

Commands.Label: /lighting
Commands.Description: Run lighting debug or management commands.

Commands.Label: /path
Commands.Description: Run pathfinding debug commands.

Commands.Label: /world
Commands.Description: Run world debug or management commands.

Commands.Label: /copy
Commands.Description: Copy the selected blocks.

Commands.Label: /cut
Commands.Description: Cut the selected blocks.

Commands.Label: /editprefab
Commands.Description: Edit a prefab.

Commands.Label: /fillblocks
Commands.Description: Fill a selected area with blocks.

Commands.Label: /paste
Commands.Description: Paste the copied blocks.

Commands.Label: /pos1
Commands.Description: Set position 1 for a selection.

Commands.Label: /pos2
Commands.Description: Set position 2 for a selection.

Commands.Label: /prefab
Commands.Description: Run prefab management commands.

Commands.Label: /replace
Commands.Description: Replace blocks inside a selection.

Commands.Label: /undo
Commands.Description: Undo the last edit action.

Palworld.SourceNotes: Official Palworld server commands list + official REST API list.

Commands.Label: AdminPassword
Commands.Description: Set the admin password for this session so admin commands will work.

Commands.Label: Shutdown
Commands.Description: Shut down the server, with an optional delay and message to players.

Commands.Label: DoExit
Commands.Description: Stop the server right away.

Commands.Label: Broadcast
Commands.Description: Send a message to all connected players.

Commands.Label: KickPlayer
Commands.Description: Kick a player by SteamID.

Commands.Label: BanPlayer
Commands.Description: Ban a player by SteamID.

Commands.Label: TeleportToPlayer
Commands.Description: Teleport yourself to the specified player.

Commands.Label: TeleportToMe
Commands.Description: Teleport the specified player to you.

Commands.Label: ShowPlayers
Commands.Description: Show the players who are connected right now.

Commands.Label: Info
Commands.Description: Show basic server information.

Commands.Label: Save
Commands.Description: Save the world data right now.

Commands.Label: UnBanPlayer
Commands.Description: Remove a SteamID from the ban list.

Commands.Label: ToggleSpectate
Commands.Description: Toggle spectator mode.

Commands.Label: REST: Info
Commands.Description: Get basic server information by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Players
Commands.Description: Get the current player list by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Settings
Commands.Description: Get the current server settings by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Metrics
Commands.Description: Get server metrics by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Announce
Commands.Description: Send a message to all players by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Unban
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the ban list by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Save
Commands.Description: Save the world data by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Shutdown
Commands.Description: Shut down the server with a delay by using the REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Stop
Commands.Description: Stop the server right away by using the REST API.

Project Zomboid.SourceNotes: Dedicated server command list aligned to the publicly updated March 20, 2026 build. Short descriptions match the current dedicated-server command classes; syntax and values are annotated where public documentation is incomplete.
Sources: help output on the target server branch remains the final authority for edge-case syntax

Commands.Label: addalltowhitelist
Commands.Description: Add all currently connected password-using users to the whitelist.
Commands.Notes: A 2022 Indie Stone changelog said this was disabled at that time even though the class exists in the current build, so verify on your branch before relying on it.

Commands.Label: additem
Commands.Description: Give an item to a player.

Values.Name: username
Values.Description: Optional in some contexts; omitted chat-style usage can target yourself.

Values.Name: module.item
Values.Description: Full item type such as Base.Axe.

Commands.Label: adduser
Commands.Description: Add a new user to a whitelist-enabled server.

Commands.Label: addusertowhitelist
Commands.Description: Add one connected password-using user to the whitelist.
Commands.Notes: Same caveat as addalltowhitelist: the class exists in the current build, but older changelog notes said it was disabled at one point.

Commands.Label: addxp
Commands.Description: Give XP to a player.

Values.Name: perkname=xp
Values.Description: Perk name paired with a numeric XP amount, for example Strength=100.

Commands.Label: banid
Commands.Description: Ban a SteamID.

Commands.Label: banuser
Commands.Description: Ban a user by name, with optional IP ban and reason.

Values.Name: -ip
Values.Description: Optional flag to also ban the user IP.

Commands.Label: godmode
Commands.Description: Turn invincibility on or off for a player.

Values.Name: username
Values.Description: Optional in some contexts; target player.

Commands.Label: grantadmin
Commands.Description: Give a user admin rights.

Commands.Label: invisible
Commands.Description: Make a player invisible to zombies.

Values.Name: username
Values.Description: Optional in some contexts; target player.

Commands.Label: kickuser
Commands.Description: Kick a user from the server.

Commands.Label: players
Commands.Description: Show the players who are connected right now.

Commands.Label: releasesafehouse
Commands.Description: Release a safehouse you own.

Commands.Label: removeadmin
Commands.Description: Remove admin rights from a user.

Commands.Label: removeuserfromwhitelist
Commands.Description: Remove a user from the whitelist.

Commands.Label: servermsg
Commands.Description: Send a message to all connected players.

Commands.Label: setaccesslevel
Commands.Description: Set a player access level, like admin or moderator.

Values.Name: accesslevel
Values.Description: Common documented roles: admin, moderator, overseer, gm, observer.

Commands.Label: teleport
Commands.Description: Teleport yourself to another player, or teleport one player to another.

Values.Name: playername
Values.Description: Single-player form teleports you to that player.

Values.Name: player1 player2
Values.Description: Two-player form teleports player1 to player2.

Commands.Label: unbanid
Commands.Description: Remove a SteamID from the ban list.

Commands.Label: unbanuser
Commands.Description: Remove a user from the ban list.

Commands.Label: voiceban
Commands.Description: Block or unblock a player's voice chat.

Values.Name: -true|-false
Values.Description: True blocks voice chat; false restores it.

Commands.Label: changeoption
Commands.Description: Change a server option to a new value.

Values.Name: optionName
Values.Description: A valid server option name, typically one shown by showoptions.

Values.Name: newValue
Values.Description: New value that matches that option type.

Commands.Label: checkModsNeedUpdate
Commands.Description: Check whether installed mods need updates and write the result to the log.

Commands.Label: clear
Commands.Description: Clear the server console output.

Commands.Label: connections
Commands.Description: Show the current connection information.

Commands.Label: help
Commands.Description: Show help and list the server commands.

Values.Name: none
Values.Description: No reliably documented arguments in the current public references.

Commands.Label: log
Commands.Description: Set the log level for a debug or logging category.
Commands.Notes: Public references agree on the two-argument shape but do not publish one clean all-in-one enum list on the command page.

Commands.Label: quit
Commands.Description: Save the world and shut down the server.

Commands.Label: reloadlua
Commands.Description: Reload a Lua file on the server.

Commands.Label: reloadoptions
Commands.Description: Reload the server options file and send the new values to clients.

Commands.Label: save
Commands.Description: Save the world right now.

Commands.Label: showoptions
Commands.Description: Show the current server options and their values.

Commands.Label: stats
Commands.Description: Turn server statistics output on, off, or to a different target and interval.

Commands.Label: addvehicle
Commands.Description: Spawn a vehicle for a player or at a set location.

Values.Name: user or x,y,z
Values.Description: Either a username or coordinate triplet. Public notes say coordinate support was added in a changelog.

Commands.Label: alarm
Commands.Description: Trigger a building alarm at the current admin location.
Commands.Notes: Must be used indoors / inside a room.

Commands.Label: chopper
Commands.Description: Trigger a helicopter event.

Values.Name: none
Values.Description: No stable public argument list verified.

Commands.Notes: Public guides usually describe this as a random-player event; older community material suggests branch-dependent behavior.

Commands.Label: createhorde
Commands.Description: Spawn a zombie horde near a player.

Values.Name: username
Values.Description: Usually supplied from the server console.

Commands.Label: createhorde2
Commands.Description: Use an alternate horde-spawn command. This command is still poorly documented.

Values.Name: undocumented
Values.Description: Public syntax and values are not reliably documented.

Commands.Notes: Treat this as present-but-undocumented until verified on your exact branch.

Commands.Label: gunshot
Commands.Description: Play a gunshot sound event on a random player.

Commands.Label: lightning
Commands.Description: Trigger lightning, optionally on a player.

Values.Name: username
Values.Description: Optional in some contexts; required from the server console according to public docs.

Commands.Label: removezombies
Commands.Description: Remove zombies from the current area.

Values.Name: undocumented
Values.Description: Public syntax and values are not reliably documented.

Commands.Notes: Treat this as present-but-undocumented until verified on your exact branch.

Commands.Label: startrain
Commands.Description: Start rain with the chosen intensity.

Commands.Label: startstorm
Commands.Description: Start a storm for a set duration.

Commands.Label: stoprain
Commands.Description: Stop the rain.

Commands.Label: stopweather
Commands.Description: Stop the active weather effects.

Commands.Label: teleportto
Commands.Description: Teleport to a set x, y, z location.

Commands.Label: thunder
Commands.Description: Trigger thunder, optionally on a player.

Values.Name: username
Values.Description: Optional in some contexts; required from the server console according to public docs.

Commands.Label: debugplayer
Commands.Description: Show debug information for a player.

Values.Name: undocumented
Values.Description: Public syntax and arguments are not reliably documented.

Commands.Notes: Verify with help output on your exact branch before exposing guided parameter entry.

Commands.Label: noclip
Commands.Description: Turn noclip on or off for a player.

Values.Name: -true|-false
Values.Description: Explicit toggle; some guides note it may also toggle without a value in practice.

Commands.Label: replay
Commands.Description: Start or manage a replay for a user. This is a legacy command.

Minecraft.SourceNotes: Common dedicated-server commands for vanilla-compatible Minecraft servers, including whitelist and operator management. Exact availability can vary slightly by version and server implementation.
Sources: In-game help output on dedicated Minecraft server builds
Common vanilla-compatible dedicated server administration commands

Commands.Label: help
Commands.Description: Show the available server commands.

Commands.Label: list
Commands.Description: Show online players and the current player count.

Commands.Label: say
Commands.Description: Broadcast a chat message to everyone on the server.

Commands.Label: msg
Commands.Description: Send a private message to one player.

Commands.Label: save-all
Commands.Description: Force the server to save the world and player data.

Commands.Label: save-off
Commands.Description: Turn off automatic world saving.

Commands.Label: save-on
Commands.Description: Turn automatic world saving back on.

Commands.Label: stop
Commands.Description: Stop the Minecraft server cleanly.

Commands.Label: kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player from the server, with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player from the server.

Commands.Label: pardon
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the ban list.

Commands.Label: ban-ip
Commands.Description: Ban an IP address directly or by using a player name.

Commands.Label: pardon-ip
Commands.Description: Remove an IP address from the banned IP list.

Commands.Label: banlist
Commands.Description: Show the current player bans or IP bans.

Commands.Label: whitelist on
Commands.Description: Turn whitelist enforcement on.

Commands.Label: whitelist off
Commands.Description: Turn whitelist enforcement off.

Commands.Label: whitelist list
Commands.Description: Show the players currently on the whitelist.

Commands.Label: whitelist reload
Commands.Description: Reload the whitelist from disk.

Commands.Label: whitelist add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the whitelist.

Commands.Label: whitelist remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the whitelist.

Commands.Label: op
Commands.Description: Grant operator permissions to a player.

Commands.Label: deop
Commands.Description: Remove operator permissions from a player.

Commands.Label: difficulty
Commands.Description: Change the server difficulty.

Commands.Label: defaultgamemode
Commands.Description: Set the default game mode for new players.

Commands.Label: gamemode
Commands.Description: Change one player's game mode.

Commands.Label: time set
Commands.Description: Set the world time.

Commands.Label: weather
Commands.Description: Change the current weather.

Satisfactory.SourceNotes: Community docs list a short set of dedicated server console commands.

Commands.Label: quit
Commands.Description: Shut down the server cleanly.

Commands.Label: stop
Commands.Description: Stop the server. This does the same thing as quit.

Commands.Label: exit
Commands.Description: Close the server process.

Commands.Label: SaveGame
Commands.Description: Force a save by using the save name you provide.

Commands.Label: FG.AutosaveInterval
Commands.Description: Set how often autosave runs, in seconds.

Commands.Label: FG.NetworkQuality
Commands.Description: Set the network quality preset.

Commands.Label: FG.DisableSeasonalEvents
Commands.Description: Turn seasonal events on or off.

Valheim.SourceNotes: Community wiki admin commands list (developer console).

Commands.Label: ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player by name, IP, or userID.

Commands.Label: banned
Commands.Description: Show the current ban list.

Commands.Label: kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player from the server by name, IP, or userID.

Commands.Label: resetworldkeys
Commands.Description: Reset the world progression keys, like boss and world unlock flags.

Commands.Label: save
Commands.Description: Save the world right now.

Commands.Label: setworldmodifier
Commands.Description: Set one world modifier to a new value.

Commands.Label: setworldpreset
Commands.Description: Apply a world preset by name.

Commands.Label: unban
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the ban list by name, IP, or userID.
